title: pinguicula lutea
intro: Pinguicula lutea, also known as the yellow butterwort, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the family Lentibulariaceae. It contains medicinal properties, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antioxidant, due to its high concentration of vitamins and minerals. Herbal preparations of Pinguicula lutea, often in the form of infusions or tinctures, are used to treat digestive issues and skin problems.
